title: Talon Precision Announces Acquisition of B & A Company, a Connecticut-Based Aerospace and Defense Precision Machining Firm
summary: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Talon Precision, a recently launched company dedicated to building the nations premier precision manufacturing business, today announced the acquisition of B & A Company, a respected precision machining firm based in Milford, CT. The transaction was completed on March 13, 2026. Founded in 1973 by Bert and Anita Schwarz, B & A Company has established itself as a vital link in the Aerospace Alley supply chain.
